metadata.coverage: 373 880 292 new files (27 TB) incrementally crawled between 01 June 2020 and 15 July 2020 mainly from .PT domain and web sites crawled during the previous crawl.
metadata.creator: Portuguese Web Archive
metadata.description: Thirty Three collection AWP. Without Deduplicator.
metadata.notes: All the items of the AWP33 crawl are identified by the custom field pwacrawlid:AWP33. The AWP33 crawl is complete because it was performed without DeDuplicator.
metadata.subject: Complete crawl of the Portuguese web; Portuguese Web Archive; Portuguese online publications; pwacrawlid:AWP33; 2020
metadata.title: The Thirty Three crawl of the Portuguese web (complete), performed in 2020 (AWP33).
